---
title: "ART-Team Workload"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/workload.json"), Path("../data/workload.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/workload.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report workload"
    )

d     = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group = d["group"]
pis   = d["pis"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
""")
```

```{python}
PHASE_LABEL = {
    "current": "🟢 Current PI",
    "future":  "🔵 Future PI",
    "past":    "⚫ Past PI",
    "unknown": "",
}

if not pis:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No PI-assigned epics found.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for pi in pis:
        phase_lbl = PHASE_LABEL.get(pi["phase"], "")
        if pi["phase"] == "current":
            phase_lbl = f"🟢 Current PI — {pi['pct_pi']}% elapsed"
        date_r = ""
        if pi["start"] and pi["end"]:
            date_r = f"<br><small style='font-weight:normal'>{pi['start']} – {pi['end']}</small>"
        html += (
            f"<h3>{pi['piid']} — {phase_lbl}{date_r}</h3>"
            '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
            "<thead><tr>"
            "<th>Group</th><th>Epics</th><th>Planned</th>"
            "<th>Actual</th><th>Δ</th><th>% Done</th><th>Status</th>"
            "</tr></thead><tbody>"
        )
        for grp in pi["groups"]:
            delta  = grp["delta"]
            d_str  = f"▲{delta}" if delta > 0 else (f"▼{abs(delta)}" if delta < 0 else "=")
            grp_lk = f'<a href="{grp["url"]}" target="_blank">{grp["name"]}</a>' if grp["url"] else grp["name"]
            ep_lk  = (f'<a href="{grp["epics_url"]}" target="_blank">{grp["epic_count"]}</a>'
                      if grp["epics_url"] else str(grp["epic_count"]))
            html  += (
                f"<tr>"
                f"<td>{grp_lk}</td>"
                f"<td>{ep_lk}</td>"
                f"<td>{grp['planned']} pt</td>"
                f"<td>{grp['actual']} pt</td>"
                f"<td>{d_str}</td>"
                f"<td>{grp['avg_pct']}%</td>"
                f"<td>{grp['status']}</td>"
                f"</tr>"
            )
        html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

- **Epics** — count of Epics, Capabilities, and Features assigned to this group for the PI
- **Planned** — sum of planned weights committed for the PI
- **Actual** — sum of story-point weights on all linked issues
- **Δ** — ▲ actual exceeds planned · ▼ actual below planned · = matched
- **% Done** — weighted average completion across epics (weighted by planned weight)
- **✅ On Track** — Current PI: % Done ≥ % of PI quarter elapsed
- **⚠️ At Risk** — Current PI: % Done < % of PI quarter elapsed
- **✅ Complete** — Past PI: all committed work finished
- **❌ Incomplete** — Past PI: PI ended with work remaining
- **🔵 Planned** — Future PI: not yet started
:::
